msk.cluster.s3.CfnAbout: The details of the Amazon S3 destination for broker logs.

msk.cluster.s3.Bucket.Description: The name of the S3 bucket that is the destination for broker logs.

msk.cluster.s3.Enabled.Description: Specifies whether broker logs get sent to the specified Amazon S3 destination.

msk.cluster.s3.Prefix.Description: The S3 prefix that is the destination for broker logs.
